mapper.sql: id, status, calc_time, calc_psn, confirm_psn, gss, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, calc_type, warehouse_code, custoemr_no, property_id, report_type, calc_finish_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.bin_order_calc
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.bin_order_calc (id, status, calc_time, calc_psn, confirm_psn, gss, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, calc_type, warehouse_code, custoemr_no, property_id, report_type, calc_finish_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{calcTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{calcPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{confirmPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{gss,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{calcType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custoemrNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reportType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{calcFinishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

update dbo.bin_order_calc
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
calc_time = #{record.calcTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
calc_psn = #{record.calcPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

report_type = #{record.reportType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
calc_finish_time = #{record.calcFinishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.bin_order_calc set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, calc_time = #{record.calcTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, calc_psn = #{record.calcPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, confirm_psn = #{record.confirmPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, gss = #{record.gss,jdbcType=BIT}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, calc_type = #{record.calcType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, custoemr_no = #{record.custoemrNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, property_id = #{record.propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, report_type = #{record.reportType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, calc_finish_time = #{record.calcFinishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
calc_time = #{calcTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
calc_psn = #{calcPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
confirm_psn = #{confirmPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

property_id = #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
report_type = #{reportType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
calc_finish_time = #{calcFinishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
